articles.title: Large language models for clinical decision support: evaluation and deployment risks
articles.title_zh: 用于临床决策支持的大语言模型：评估与部署风险
articles.abstract: This sample article discusses evaluation frameworks, safety constraints and real-world deployment risks for large language models in clinical medicine.
articles.abstract_zh: 这是一条示例论文，讨论临床医学中大语言模型的评估框架、安全约束和真实世界部署风险。

articles.title: A foundation model for single-cell perturbation response prediction
articles.title_zh: 用于单细胞扰动响应预测的基础模型
articles.abstract: This sample preprint presents a transformer-based representation learning framework for predicting perturbation response in single-cell transcriptomics.
articles.abstract_zh: 这是一条示例预印本，提出了基于 Transformer 的表征学习框架，用于预测单细胞转录组扰动响应。

articles.title: Generative models for molecular design in antibiotic discovery
articles.title_zh: 用于抗生素发现中分子设计的生成式模型
articles.abstract: This sample article tracks generative modeling, virtual screening and validation strategies for antimicrobial drug discovery.
articles.abstract_zh: 这是一条示例论文，用于展示抗菌药物发现中的生成模型、虚拟筛选和验证策略。

articles.title: Causal machine learning for infectious disease surveillance
articles.title_zh: 用于传染病监测的因果机器学习
articles.abstract: This sample preprint focuses on causal inference, outbreak surveillance and robust epidemiological forecasting.
articles.abstract_zh: 这是一条示例预印本，关注因果推断、疫情监测和稳健的流行病学预测。
